description: Measure the gallbladder on the provided abdominal CT, including longitudinal length, maximum transverse diameter, and wall thickness. Assess for distension, wall thickening, pericholecystic fluid, and gallstones. Save measurement markups to ~/Documents/SlicerData/AMOS/gallbladder_measurements.mrk.json and export a report to ~/Documents/SlicerData/AMOS/gallbladder_report.json with the structure: {patient_id, gallbladder_identified, measurements: {length_cm, transverse_diameter_cm, wall_thickness_mm}, findings: {distension, wall_thickening, pericholecystic_fluid, gallstones_visible}, classification, recommendation}.
